name: python
description: Python language power pack — type safety, security checks, and Pythonic-code reasoning across Django/FastAPI/Flask projects
rules: Enforce PEP 8 style and PEP 484 type hints on public functions
Flag SQL string concatenation and recommend parameterized queries
Catch bare except clauses and broad Exception handlers without re-raise
Verify pickle/yaml.load aren't used on untrusted input
Check requirements.txt / pyproject.toml for known-vulnerable packages
Validate async/await consistency — no sync I/O in async functions

checks.description: Detect eval/exec usage which enables code injection
Detect SQL string concatenation/f-string interpolation in queries
Detect subprocess calls with shell=True (command injection risk)
Avoid os.system — prefer subprocess with shell=False
pickle.loads on untrusted data enables RCE
yaml.load without SafeLoader enables arbitrary object construction
Bare 'except:' clauses swallow KeyboardInterrupt and SystemExit
Mutable default arguments are shared across calls (use None + early init)
Detect likely hardcoded secrets (API keys, passwords, tokens)
Public functions should have type hints (PEP 484)
print() left in non-CLI source — prefer logging module
requests.{get,post,...} without timeout can hang indefinitely
assert statements are stripped with python -O — don't use for security
